question_frequency.rationale: The Pair never asks the user any didactic questions. It writes the entire solution and tests upfront, then walks through the design. The only Q&A came from the user asking to verify their trace.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks were surfaced to the user. Design decisions (two APIs, 10th-frame summing, two-pass validation) were made unilaterally without inviting reflection.

scaffolding.rationale: There's no progressive scaffolding — just a code dump followed by a tabular explainer. The user-driven trace at the end did get a clean, well-targeted correction about the 10th frame, but that's incidental to any planned pedagogy.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the final correction about 10th-frame roll consumption is genuinely useful and well-explained. But the dynamic is lecture-then-Q&A rather than collaborative back-and-forth.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
